'''Sector General''' was a [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. A number of them turned [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
